config.title: Multi-LLM Provider for Copilot
config.providers.desc: List of LLM providers. Each provider defines a base URL, API mode (openai/anthropic/auto), model list, and authentication. Models show up in Copilot Chat's model picker grouped by the provider's group field.
config.commitLanguage.desc: Language for commit messages. 'auto' detects from recent commits.
config.commitLanguage.auto.desc: Detect language from recent commits in the repository
config.commitLanguage.enum.ChineseSimpli: Generate commit messages in Simplified Chinese (简体中文)
config.commitLanguage.enum.ChineseTradit: Generate commit messages in Traditional Chinese (繁體中文)
config.commitLanguage.enum.Japanese.desc: Generate commit messages in Japanese (日本語)
config.commitLanguage.enum.PortugueseBra: Generate commit messages in Brazilian Portuguese (Português do Brasil)
config.commitModel.desc: Composite model ID (providerId:modelId) used for Git commit message generation. Example: 'opencode-go:deepseek-v4-flash'
config.commitMessagePrompt.desc: Custom system prompt template for commit message generation. Leave empty to use default.
config.requestTimeout.desc: Request timeout in milliseconds (default 600000 = 10 min). Increase if models take long to respond with large context.
config.recentCommitsCount.desc: Number of recent commits to reference for style in commit message generation.
config.commitIncludeCommitDiff.desc: Include the diff of recent commits when generating commit messages for better style matching.
config.commitAttachContextFiles.desc: Attach AGENTS.md and README.md content as context for commit message generation.
config.modelPreset.desc: Model preset to use ('custom' enables manual temperature/top_p). Set via 'Set Model Preset' command.
config.temperature.desc: Temperature for the model. Higher values = more creative (0-2). Only used when modelPreset is 'custom'.
config.top_p.desc: Top-p sampling for the model. Only used when modelPreset is 'custom'.
config.modelPresets.desc: Customizable presets for switching temperature and top_p.
config.modelPreset.label.desc: Preset label (must match localization keys: Precise, Balanced, Creative, Extra Creative).
config.modelPreset.top_p.desc: Top-p value (0-1). Leave empty for no override.
config.visionProxyModel.desc: Model to use for vision/image description when the chat model does not support vision. Example: 'opencode-go:qwen3.6-plus'.
config.visionProxyThinking.desc: Enable thinking mode for the vision proxy model.
config.enableThirdPartyTokenIndicator.de: Show advanced token usage indicator in the status bar. When disabled, only the native Copilot token indicator is used.
